title: engine-rattle-splitter
lede: Splits a recording into low-band (combustion drone) and high-band (mechanical rattles) stems via complementary Butterworth crossover.

items.title: Original recording
items.label: {input_ext}
items.description: Untouched input - motorcycle engine with intermittent rattles.

items.title: Engine stem
items.label: mp3 - low band, < {crossover_hz} Hz
items.description: Combustion drone, idle fundamentals, low-mid body.

items.alt: log-frequency dB spectrogram of the original recording

items.description: Frame features and per-octave-band energy contrast across the {split_at} s mark.
items.alt: analysis plot of the original recording

items.description: Same analysis applied to the rattles stem validates the split.
